company_name: 公益社団法人北海道シルバー人材センター連合会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Silver HR Center is senior temp/dispatch staffing for temporary light work, not headhunting
notes: Official site at webc.sjc.ne.jp/doushiren/ matches company name exactly. Public contact form at /inquiry_1. No public email published. Organization provides temporary/part-time work for seniors (臨時的かつ短期的/軽易な業務), which is dispatch/temp staffing, a non-headhunter vertical.
